title: One-Pot Tomato Orzo
description: My Thermomix take on a Jamie Oliver-style one-pot tomato orzo — creamy, cheesy and all in one bowl.
intro: This is my independent Thermomix homage to Jamie Oliver and the comforting appeal of tomato orzo. It keeps the spirit of the original inspiration, but the method is written fresh for TM6 and TM7 cooks who want clear settings and a warm, achievable result.
steps: Chop onion and garlic 4 sec / speed 5. Add oil, sauté 3 min / 120°C / speed 1.
Add the orzo, passata, stock and oregano. Cook 14 min / 100°C / Reverse / speed 1, MC off, until the orzo is tender and creamy.
Stir through parmesan, season and finish with basil.
tips: Stir at the end so the orzo doesn't stick — Reverse does most of it.
Add spinach in the last 3 minutes for greens.

faq.a: Yes — risoni and orzo are the same thing.

faq.q: Is this the original Jamie Oliver recipe?
faq.a: No. This is Chef Aly’s independent Thermomix reinterpretation inspired by Jamie Oliver and tomato orzo; it is not endorsed by or affiliated with the chef.
